name: Cheese Pudding Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix crust and press into the pie pan. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes.
2. Prepare chocolate pudding as directed on package.
3. With a mixer, combine sugar and cream cheese.
4. Fold in half of Cool Whip.
5. Pour mixture onto crust.
6. Add chocolate pudding.
7. Top with remaining Cool Whip topping.
8. Sprinkle with broken pecans.
9. Refrigerate before serving.
